title: Fix Live Server extension inconsistency in Phase 0/1
description: 00-foundations/04-your-workspace.md:22-25 lists the recommended VS Code extensions as 'Markdown Preview Enhanced' and 'Prettier'. 01-talking-to-agents/05-first-build.md:97 then says 'Open the file in your browser (double-click it, or in VS Code right-click and select Open with Live Server if you installed that extension).' Live Server was never mentioned or installed in Phase 0, so the conditional 'if you installed' leaves a novice confused about whether they should have. Fix: Either (a) add 'Live Server (by Ritwick Dey)' to the Phase 0 recommended extensions list with a one-line note that it auto-reloads HTML projects in the browser, or (b) remove the Live Server mention from 05-first-build.md and tell the reader to double-click the file directly. Option (a) is better because live reload is genuinely useful for the iterative loop the chapter teaches.
